response:
SELECT s.Name, s.Capacity
FROM stadium s
WHERE s.Stadium_ID IN (
    SELECT c.Stadium_ID
    FROM concert c
    WHERE YEAR(c.Concert_Date) > 2013
    GROUP BY c.Stadium_ID
    HAVING COUNT(*) = (
        SELECT MAX(sub.cnt)
        FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt
            FROM concert
            WHERE YEAR(Concert_Date) > 2013
            GROUP BY Stadium_ID
        ) AS sub
    )
)
